root: ^Noelle: Eww... what's this thing? It has whiskers!
^Sam: It's a catfish! Named because it has those whiskers - doesn't it look a little bit like a cat?
^Noelle: It kind of looks like my cat at home, actually... I never thought fish could look like this.
^Sam: Apparently, cats also love to eat catfish. Wanna take this one home for your pet?
^Noelle: Will that be okay? I feel a bit bad feeding it something with "cat" in the name...
^Sam: Well, nobody at the market will buy it, so it'll just rot out here if nothing eats it.
^Sam: Catfish sometimes have parasites that are bad for humans, but cats are totally fine against them! Cool, right?
^Noelle: Yeah! My cat is eating good tonight, then!
